results.name: specific_nodes_scope
results.description: `var {name} scope=specific_nodes ids=[{n1},{n2}] → visible only on listed {node}`
results.description_long:
# specific_nodes_scope

**Use-case:** allowlisted variable visibility

**Template:** `var [scope=specific_nodes ids=[1,2]]`

## Asserted path

```
┌─ NodeA (LLMNode · task_following) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
│
│  #1   🗣  speak
│       "Hello! What is your name?"
│
│  #2   📥 collect → customer_name   [settable · scope=specific_nodes ids=[1,2]]
│       "The customer's name"
│
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       │
       └─── edge #1 (linear)  ──► NodeB

┌─ NodeB (LLMNode · task_following) ───────────────────────
│  in scope: customer_name [id=2 ∈ [1,2]]
│
│  #1   🗣  speak
│       "Let me check your details."
│
│  #2   📥 collect → proceed   [Boolean · settable]
│       "Whether to proceed"
│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       │
       └─── edge #2 (linear)  ──► NodeC

┌─ NodeC (LLMNode · task_following) ───────────────────────
│  out of scope: customer_name [id=3 ∉ [1,2]]
│
│  #1   🗣  speak
│       "Almost done."
│
│  #2   📥 collect → finish   [Boolean · settable]
│       "Whether to finish"
│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       │
       └─── edge #3 (linear)  ──► End

┌─ End (EndCallNode · mode=flexible) ──────────────────────
│
│  goodbye_message:
│    "Thank you for calling. Goodbye!"
│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

## Sample Conversation

```
┌─ Transcript ──────────────────────────────────────────────────
│  🤖  "Hello! What is your name?"
│                                         My name is Alice  👤
│  🤖  "Let me check your details."
│                                                 Continue  👤
│  🤖  "Almost done."
│                                                 Continue  👤
│  🤖  [flexible goodbye]
│      "Thanks — goodbye!"
└───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

**Marker convention**
- `#N` — workflow instruction_steps (from `workflow.yaml`)
- `🗣` — speak step
- `📥` — collect step
- `[settable]` — `node_variables[].access_mode`
- `[scope=specific_nodes ids=[…]]` — `node_variables[].scope` allowlist
- `edge #K` — outgoing edge on the source node
- `──►` — route to next node
- `🤖  "..."` — literal bot turn (one-line, pinned by workflow.yaml)
- `🤖  [label]` + quoted line — labeled paraphrase (two-line, runtime-generated)
- `[flexible goodbye]` — EndCallNode flexible goodbye, driven by `goodbye_message_mode: flexible`

meta.conditional_description: Transition to NodeB after collecting name
Transition to NodeC after NodeB check
Transition to End after NodeC check

nodes.title: NodeA
nodes.prompt: Ask the user for their name.
nodes.description: Collect customer_name with SPECIFIC_NODES scope (visible on nodes 1 and 2)

nodes.title: NodeB
nodes.prompt: Tell the user you are checking their details.
nodes.description: Verify customer_name IS visible (id=2 is in scope_node_ids)

nodes.title: NodeC
nodes.prompt: Tell the user we are almost done.
nodes.description: Verify customer_name is NOT visible (id=3 is NOT in scope_node_ids)

results.name: settable_variable
results.description_long:
# settable_variable

**Use-case:** baseline name collection

**Template:** `collect → {var} [settable]`

## Asserted path

```
┌─ CollectSettable (LLMNode · task_following) ─────────────
│
│  #1   🗣  speak
│       "Hello! May I have your name please?"
│
│  #2   📥 collect → customer_name   [settable]
│       "May I have your name please?"
│       "The customer's full name"
│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
                 │
                 ▼
┌─ Confirmation (EndCallNode · mode=flexible) ─────────────
│
│  goodbye_message:
│    "Information collected. Thank the user and say
│     goodbye."
│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

## Sample Conversation

```
┌─ Transcript ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
│  🤖  "Hello! May I have your name please?"
│                                   My name is John Smith  👤
│  🤖  [flexible goodbye]
│      "Thanks John — have a great day!"
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

**Marker convention**
- `#N` — workflow instruction_steps (from `workflow.yaml`)
- `🗣` — speak step
- `📥` — collect step
- `[settable]` — `node_variables[].access_mode`
- `🤖  "..."` — literal bot turn (one-line, pinned by workflow.yaml)
- `🤖  [label]` + quoted line — labeled paraphrase (two-line, runtime-generated)
- `[flexible goodbye]` — EndCallNode flexible goodbye, driven by `goodbye_message_mode: flexible`

meta.conditional_description: Transition to Confirmation when customer_name is collected

results.name: read_only_variable
results.description: `var {name} access_mode=read_only → renders via {{ jinja }}, not extracted`
results.description_long:
# read_only_variable

**Use-case:** pre-populated account confirmation

**Template:** `speak uses {{ var }} [read_only]`

## Asserted path

```
┌─ CollectReadOnly (LLMNode · task_following) ────────────────────────
│
│  declares: account_id [read_only]  "The user's account identifier"
│
│  node prompt:
│    "The user's account ID is {{ account_id }}. Ask
│     the user to confirm this is correct."
│
│  #1   🗣  speak
│       "Hello! I have your account ID as ACC-12345.
│        Can you confirm that is correct?"
│
│  #2   📥 collect → confirmation   [Boolean · settable]
│       "Can you confirm that your account ID is correct?"
│
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
                 │
                 ▼
┌─ Confirmation (EndCallNode · mode=flexible) ─────────────
│
│  goodbye_message:
│    "Information collected. Thank the user and say
│     goodbye."
│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

## Sample Conversation

```
┌─ Transcript ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
│  🤖  "Hello! I have your account ID as ACC-12345. Can you confirm that is correct?"
│                                     Yes, that's correct  👤
│  🤖  [flexible goodbye]
│      "Great — thanks for confirming. Have a good one!"
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

**Marker convention**
- `#N` — workflow instruction_steps (from `workflow.yaml`)
- `🗣` — speak step
- `📥` — collect step
- `[read_only]` / `[settable]` — `node_variables[].access_mode`
- `{{ var }}` — Jinja reference inside a literal prompt
- `🤖  "..."` — literal bot turn (one-line, pinned by workflow.yaml)
- `🤖  [label]` + quoted line — labeled paraphrase (two-line, runtime-generated)
- `[flexible goodbye]` — EndCallNode flexible goodbye, driven by `goodbye_message_mode: flexible`

meta.conditional_description: Transition to Confirmation when confirmation is collected

**Template:** `var {name} [private]`

## Asserted path

```
┌─ CollectPrivate (LLMNode · task_following) ────────────────────────────────
│
│  declares: internal_tracking_id [private]  "Internal tracking identifier"
│
│  #1   🗣  speak
│       "Hello! May I have your name please?"
│
│  #2   📥 collect → customer_name   [settable]
│       "May I have your name please?"
│
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
                 │
                 ▼
┌─ Confirmation (EndCallNode · mode=flexible) ─────────────
│
│  goodbye_message:
│    "Information collected. Thank the user and say
│     goodbye."
│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

## Sample Conversation

```
┌─ Transcript ─────────────────────────────────────────────────
│  🤖  "Hello! May I have your name please?"
│                                     My name is Jane Doe  👤
│  🤖  [flexible goodbye]
│      "Thanks Jane — have a great day!"
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

**Marker convention**
- `#N` — workflow instruction_steps (from `workflow.yaml`)
- `🗣` — speak step
- `📥` — collect step
- `[private]` / `[settable]` — `node_variables[].access_mode`
- `🤖  "..."` — literal bot turn (one-line, pinned by workflow.yaml)
- `🤖  [label]` + quoted line — labeled paraphrase (two-line, runtime-generated)
- `[flexible goodbye]` — EndCallNode flexible goodbye, driven by `goodbye_message_mode: flexible`

results.name: node_scope_isolated
results.description_long:
# node_scope_isolated

**Use-case:** node-local value does not leak forward

**Template:** `var [scope=node] → isolated to origin node`

## Asserted path

```
┌─ NodeA (LLMNode · task_following) ──────────────────────────
│
│  #1   🗣  speak
│       "Hello! What is your name?"
│
│  #2   📥 collect → customer_name   [settable · scope=node]
│       "The customer's name"
│
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       │
       └─── edge #1 (linear)  ──► NodeB

┌─ NodeB (LLMNode · task_following) ───────────────────────
│  out of scope: customer_name [scope=node · NodeA]
│
│  #1   🗣  speak
│       "Thank you. Let me verify your information."
│
│  #2   📥 collect → proceed   [Boolean · settable]
│       "Whether to proceed"
│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       │
       └─── edge #2 (linear)  ──► End

┌─ End (EndCallNode · mode=flexible) ──────────────────────
│
│  goodbye_message:
│    "Thank you for calling. Goodbye!"
│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

## Sample Conversation

```
┌─ Transcript ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
│  🤖  "Hello! What is your name?"
│                                         My name is Alice  👤
│  🤖  "Thank you. Let me verify your information."
│                                              Yes, go ahead  👤
│  🤖  [flexible goodbye]
│      "Thanks — goodbye!"
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

**Marker convention**
- `#N` — workflow instruction_steps (from `workflow.yaml`)
- `🗣` — speak step
- `📥` — collect step
- `[settable]` — `node_variables[].access_mode`
- `[scope=node]` — `node_variables[].scope` (visible only on origin node)
- `edge #K` — outgoing edge on the source node
- `──►` — route to next node
- `🤖  "..."` — literal bot turn (one-line, pinned by workflow.yaml)
- `🤖  [label]` + quoted line — labeled paraphrase (two-line, runtime-generated)
- `[flexible goodbye]` — EndCallNode flexible goodbye, driven by `goodbye_message_mode: flexible`

results.name: mixed_scopes
results.description_long:
# mixed_scopes

**Use-case:** three scope kinds on a single node

**Template:** `node holds [scope=workflow] + [scope=specific_nodes] + [scope=node]`

## Asserted path

```
┌─ NodeA (LLMNode · task_following) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
│
│  #1   🗣  speak
│       "Hello! Please provide your name, order number,
│        and secret code."
│
│  #2   📥 collect → global_var     [settable · scope=workflow]
│       "The customer's name (global scope)"
│
│  #3   📥 collect → specific_var   [Alphanumeric · settable · scope=specific_nodes ids=[1,2]]
│       "The order number (specific_nodes scope)"
│
│  #4   📥 collect → node_var       [Alphanumeric · settable · scope=node]
│       "The secret code (node scope)"
│
└───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       │
       └─── edge #1 (linear)  ──► NodeB

┌─ NodeB (LLMNode · task_following) ───────────────────────
│  in scope:     global_var    [scope=workflow]
│  in scope:     specific_var  [id=2 ∈ [1,2]]
│  out of scope: node_var      [scope=node · NodeA]
│
│  #1   🗣  speak
│       "Thank you. Let me verify everything."
│
│  #2   📥 collect → proceed   [Boolean · settable]
│       "Whether to proceed"
│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       │
       └─── edge #2 (linear)  ──► End

┌─ End (EndCallNode · mode=flexible) ──────────────────────
│
│  goodbye_message:
│    "Thank you for calling. Goodbye!"
│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

## Sample Conversation

```
┌─ Transcript ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
│  🤖  "Hello! Please provide your name, order number, and secret code."
│                                                   Alice  👤
│
│                                                     123  👤
│
│                                                     xyz  👤
│  🤖  "Thank you. Let me verify everything."
│                                                     Yes  👤
│  🤖  [flexible goodbye]
│      "Thanks — goodbye!"
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

**Marker convention**
- `#N` — workflow instruction_steps (from `workflow.yaml`)
- `🗣` — speak step
- `📥` — collect step
- `[settable]` — `node_variables[].access_mode`
- `[scope=workflow|node|specific_nodes]` — `node_variables[].scope`
- `edge #K` — outgoing edge on the source node
- `──►` — route to next node
- `🤖  "..."` — literal bot turn (one-line, pinned by workflow.yaml)
- `🤖  [label]` + quoted line — labeled paraphrase (two-line, runtime-generated)
- `[flexible goodbye]` — EndCallNode flexible goodbye, driven by `goodbye_message_mode: flexible`

meta.conditional_description: Transition to NodeB after collecting all variables

results.name: mixed_access_modes
results.description_long:
# mixed_access_modes

**Use-case:** order lookup with mixed variable kinds

**Template:** `node holds [private] + [read_only] + [settable]`

## Asserted path

```
┌─ CollectMixed (LLMNode · task_following) ─────────────────────────────
│
│  node prompt:
│    "The caller has order {{ order_id }}. Ask for their
│     name to look up the order."
│
│  declares: api_key [private]  "Internal API key for backend lookups"
│
│  #1   🗣  speak
│       "Hello! I see your order ORD-5678. May I have
│        your name please?"
│
│  #2   📥 collect → customer_name   [settable]
│       "May I have your name please?"
│
└───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
                 │
                 ▼
┌─ Confirmation (EndCallNode · mode=flexible) ─────────────
│
│  goodbye_message:
│    "Information collected. Thank the user and say
│     goodbye."
│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

## Sample Conversation

```
┌─ Transcript ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
│  🤖  "Hello! I see your order ORD-5678. May I have your name please?"
│                                My name is Alice Johnson  👤
│  🤖  [flexible goodbye]
│      "Thanks Alice — have a great day!"
└────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

**Marker convention**
- `#N` — workflow instruction_steps (from `workflow.yaml`)
- `🗣` — speak step
- `📥` — collect step
- `[private]` / `[read_only]` / `[settable]` — `node_variables[].access_mode`
- `{{ var }}` — Jinja reference inside a literal prompt
- `🤖  "..."` — literal bot turn (one-line, pinned by workflow.yaml)
- `🤖  [label]` + quoted line — labeled paraphrase (two-line, runtime-generated)
- `[flexible goodbye]` — EndCallNode flexible goodbye, driven by `goodbye_message_mode: flexible`

results.name: global_scope_persists
results.description_long:
# global_scope_persists

**Use-case:** name carries across the graph

**Template:** `var [scope=workflow] → persists across nodes`

## Asserted path

```
┌─ NodeA (LLMNode · task_following) ──────────────────────────────
│
│  #1   🗣  speak
│       "Hello! What is your name?"
│
│  #2   📥 collect → customer_name   [settable · scope=workflow]
│       "The customer's name"
│
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       │
       └─── edge #1 (linear)  ──► NodeB

┌─ NodeB (LLMNode · task_following) ────────────────────────────
│  inherits: customer_name [scope=workflow]  (set by NodeA #2)
│
│  #1   🗣  speak
│       "Thank you. Let me verify your information."
│
│  #2   📥 collect → proceed   [Boolean · settable]
│       "Whether to proceed"
│
└───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       │
       └─── edge #2 (linear)  ──► End

┌─ End (EndCallNode · mode=flexible) ──────────────────────
│
│  goodbye_message:
│    "Thank you for calling. Goodbye!"
│
└──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

## Sample Conversation

```
┌─ Transcript ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
│  🤖  "Hello! What is your name?"
│                                         My name is Alice  👤
│  🤖  "Thank you. Let me verify your information."
│                                              Yes, go ahead  👤
│  🤖  [flexible goodbye]
│      "Thanks Alice — goodbye!"
└─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
```

**Marker convention**
- `#N` — workflow instruction_steps (from `workflow.yaml`)
- `🗣` — speak step
- `📥` — collect step
- `[settable]` — `node_variables[].access_mode`
- `[scope=workflow]` — `node_variables[].scope` (visible on every node)
- `edge #K` — outgoing edge on the source node
- `──►` — route to next node
- `🤖  "..."` — literal bot turn (one-line, pinned by workflow.yaml)
- `🤖  [label]` + quoted line — labeled paraphrase (two-line, runtime-generated)
- `[flexible goodbye]` — EndCallNode flexible goodbye, driven by `goodbye_message_mode: flexible`
